mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows or forward returns are negative in 60% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate exceeding 7.0% signals severe labor market deterioration that compresses corporate earnings expectations, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in 55% of instances when UNRATE crosses 7.0%, or t-statistic for return difference is below 1.5.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and builder confidence, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations of RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict positive returns with a p-value below 0.10 in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indices reflect strengthening manufacturing output that boosts short-term equity momentum, yielding positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.01) during inflationary periods or when CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5% annualized.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly real GDP growth surpassing 3.0% confirms robust aggregate demand that supports corporate revenue expansion, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in 65% of quarters where GDPC1 growth exceeds 3.0%, or regression coefficient is statistically insignificant at the 95% confidence level.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation triggers expectations of tighter monetary policy that compresses equity multiples, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive in 70% of high-inflation months, or the signal fails to separate bull and bear markets with a Sharpe ratio above 0.5.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent job growth and falling unemployment rates indicate a tightening labor market that raises wage pressures and consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in 60% of occurrences, or interaction term coefficient is insignificant in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained increases in industrial production and personal consumption expenditures reflect synchronized supply and demand strength that supports equity valuations, yielding positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank correlation between proxy momentum and forward returns falls below 0.05 over rolling 5-year windows, or out-of-sample R-squared is negative.
